summary: Konekt B2B E-commerce Platform - All 5 Acceptance Checks PASSED (v135). Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified via Playwright.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 acceptance checks verified and passing. CHECK 1: Customer invoices show PAYER NAME column with real names (Suwena, John, Mac Geofrey, Federica, Mac, Pendo, Moses, Don). CHECK 2: Customer notifications API returns 'Payment Approved' notification with target_url '/account/invoices'. CHECK 3: Customer order drawer shows 'YOUR KONEKT SALES CONTACT' section with real sales info (Janeth Msuya, +255710000001, janeth.sales@konekt.demo). CHECK 4: Admin orders table shows all 4 required columns (Customer, Payer, Assigned Sales, Assigned Vendor) with real data. CHECK 5: Vendor/Partner orders page shows CUSTOMER column with real customer names ('Demo Customer').

check_1_customer_invoice_payer_name.details: Customer invoices page shows PAYER NAME column with real names (Suwena, John, Mac Geofrey, Federica, Mac, Pendo, Moses, Don). Invoice drawer shows Bill To with customer name.

check_2_customer_payment_notification.details: Customer notifications API returns 'Payment Approved' notification with title='Payment Approved', target_url='/account/invoices', message='Your payment has been approved. Open the invoice, then track your order progress.'

check_3_customer_order_sales_contact.details: Customer order drawer shows 'YOUR KONEKT SALES CONTACT' section with real sales person info: Janeth Msuya, +255710000001, janeth.sales@konekt.demo. Call and Email buttons present.

check_4_admin_orders_columns.details: Admin orders table shows all 4 required columns: Customer (Demo Customer, Test Business Ltd), Payer (John, Mac Geofrey, Federica, Mac, Pendo, Moses), Assigned Sales (Janeth Msuya, Neema Mallya, Brian Kweka), Assigned Vendor (shows '-' for orders without vendor assignments).

check_5_vendor_orders_customer_name.details: Vendor/Partner orders page shows CUSTOMER column with real customer names ('Demo Customer'). 6 vendor orders displayed with proper customer names.
